title: SOAPClinicalNote
description: Structural completeness contract for a SOAP clinical note.

encounter_date.description: Date of the clinical encounter (ISO 8601 date).

subjective.description: Patient-reported symptoms and history (the S in SOAP).

objective.description: Observable, measurable clinical findings (the O in SOAP).

assessment.description: Clinician's diagnosis or differential (the A in SOAP).

plan.description: Treatment plan and next steps (the P in SOAP).

icd10_codes.description: ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes supporting the assessment.
